scorecard.assignment_basis: geometric luminosity-distance method with no stellar photometric calibrator leg
scorecard.source: Improved constraint on the Hubble constant from dark sirens with LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA O4a

scorecard.assignment_basis: direct stellar-photometric standard-candle chain with one uncancelled photometric leg
scorecard.source: Status Report on the Chicago-Carnegie Hubble Program (CCHP): Measurement of the Hubble Constant Using the Hubble and James Webb Space Telescopes

scorecard.assignment_basis: non-geometric Fermat/Weyl class at alpha=2 with centered lens normalization
scorecard.source: TDCOSMO 2025: Cosmological constraints from strong lensing time delays

scorecard.assignment_basis: Cepheid/SN ladder with two uncancelled photometric calibrator legs
scorecard.source: SH0ES / Pantheon+ local distance ladder comparison used by Paper 34

scorecard.assignment_basis: TRGB-calibrated SN ladder with two uncancelled photometric calibrator legs
scorecard.source: The Perfect Host: JWST Cepheid Observations in a Background-free Type Ia Supernova Host Confirm No Bias in Hubble-constant Measurements
